summary: Comprehensive testing of CryptoQuiz Telegram Mini App - Backend fully functional (100%), frontend mostly working with one integration issue

working_endpoints: POST /api/session/create - Creates session with 8-char hex code
POST /api/quiz/solo - Returns quiz WITH correct answers

integration_issues.flow: Article content fetching in Host page
integration_issues.issue: Frontend gets 422 error when calling /api/academy/article after selecting search result
integration_issues.impact: Blocks host quiz creation flow after article selection
integration_issues.details: Backend API works fine when tested directly, suggesting frontend request format issue

passed_tests: Homepage loads with all required data-testids: host-quiz-btn, join-quiz-btn, solo-quiz-btn
Host page search-input and search-btn work correctly
Academy search returns proper results via frontend
Join page has working join-code-input, nickname-input, join-game-btn
Solo page has working solo-search-input and solo-search-btn
Form inputs accept user input correctly
Responsive design and styling work well
Backend API endpoints all return correct responses
Quiz generation with short content works (LLM issue resolved)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend article fetching integration - The /api/academy/article endpoint works perfectly when tested directly but returns 422 when called from frontend after selecting search results. Check request payload format in Host page article selection.
